backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the FIESTA event planning app, defining data types and persistent storage for users, events, organizers, bookings, reviews, and photos, along with CRUD operations and role-based access control via authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (real-time booking list updates, inline organizer booking requests on dashboard, and Book Now button contrast fix) to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Structured text file containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and recent changes of each component, page, and hook in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to FIESTA and mounting the React app into a root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (landing, guest, organizer, admin) wrapped in a Layout that includes Header, Footer, and a conditional ProfileSetupModal for first-time users.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsC: Reusable card component for displaying a single analytics metric with an icon, label, value, and optional description.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsD: Admin analytics dashboard component that fetches organizer and event data to display summary statistics including total counts, most popular event type, and highest-rated organizer using AnalyticsCard.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clears the React Query cache on logout, and renders with red styling for the logout state.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that collects a new user's full name and email to create their profile, using the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation and blocking dismissal until submitted.
frontend/src/components/booking/BookingR: A modal that lets a guest select one of their existing events and submit a booking request to a specific organizer, then redirects to the bookings page on success.
frontend/src/components/booking/GuestBoo: Renders a list of booking cards for a guest, each fetching and displaying the associated event's details (date, location, guests, style, contact) alongside the booking status.
frontend/src/components/booking/Organize: Displays a single booking request for an organizer with full event details and approve/reject action buttons that call the `useUpdateBookingStatus` mutation.
Renders an organizer's bookings split into two sections—pending requests and past bookings—using `OrganizerBookingCard` for each entry.
frontend/src/components/events/CreateEve: A form for guests to create a new event by specifying type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact number, with past-date validation and backend submission via `useCreateEvent`.
frontend/src/components/events/EventList: Displays a list of event cards showing each event's type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact number formatted from nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A simple site footer showing the copyright year and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Responsive site header with navigation links for authenticated users (My Events, Find Organizers, My Bookings, Organizer Dashboard) and a login button, supporting both desktop and mobile (hamburger) layouts.
frontend/src/components/organizer/EventP: Displays a grid of event photos with hover zoom effect and a keyboard-navigable lightbox modal for full-size viewing.
Dialog-based lightbox component that fetches and displays an organizer's event photos with thumbnail strip navigation and keyboard arrow-key support.
Allows organizers to upload and delete event photos, showing upload progress and a thumbnail grid of existing photos.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Organi: Card component displaying an organizer's profile info (portfolio preview, stats, availability) with buttons to view their work or open a booking request modal.
Sortable table comparing multiple organizer profiles by rating or experience, with a book action that opens a BookingRequestModal for the selected organizer.

A form component for creating or editing an organizer profile, with fields for company name, contact, experience, pricing, description, and availability status, using React state and a save mutation hook.
A read-only display component for an organizer's profile, showing stats (experience, reviews, pricing, contact), description, and a portfolio gallery card.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Portfo: A gallery component that renders portfolio images in a grid with thumbnail previews and a lightbox dialog for full-size viewing with prev/next navigation.
A component for uploading and deleting organizer portfolio images, displaying existing images in a grid with hover-to-delete functionality and a file input trigger.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A React Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated caller's user profile from the backend actor, waiting until the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, organizer profiles, events, bookings, reviews, and portfolio images using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a navy/gold theme with light and dark mode variants.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only page that renders the AnalyticsDashboard component, redirecting non-admin or unauthenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/GuestBookings.tsx: Authenticated guest page that fetches and displays the current user's bookings via GuestBookingList, redirecting unauthenticated users to home.
Authenticated guest page showing a form to create new events and a list of the user's existing events side by side.
frontend/src/pages/GuestOrganizerBrowsin: Authenticated page that lists all organizer profiles in a grid with OrganizerCard components and supports viewing an organizer's event photos in a lightbox.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, feature cards, and CTA section; directs authenticated users to the guest events dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerBookingManag: Authenticated organizer page that fetches and displays incoming booking requests via OrganizerBookingList with a back-navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerComparison.t: Authenticated page that reads organizer IDs from URL search params and renders a side-by-side OrganizerComparisonTable for the selected organizers.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerDashboard.ts: React page for the organizer dashboard that displays profile, portfolio images, event photos, and inline booking requests, with loading/error/unauthenticated states handled.
frontend/src/ui/button.tsx: Reusable Button component built with class-variance-authority supporting multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, etc.) and sizes, with optional asChild rendering via Radix Slot.
frontend/src/ui/card.tsx: Collection of composable Card UI components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, CardAction) using forwardRef and Tailwind utility classes.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Utility functions to convert PortfolioImage, EventPhoto, and ExternalBlob objects into displayable URL strings, handling HTTP, blob, and data URL formats.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom navy/gold color scale, semantic design tokens, typography, container queries, and animation plugins for the FIESTA project.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for FIESTA describing existing features, known issues (real-time booking sync, inline booking requests, Book Now button contrast), and fix requests at schema version 1.0.0.
